title: Founder's Technical Associate

must_haves.req: Automate workflows; comfortable no-code/low-code; ideally write code
must_haves.note: Claude Code agent building and automation interest fit; 'ideally write code' / Supabase / API integrations are a stretch vs operator-level depth.
Founder's-associate and content/PR background covers this.

one_line_verdict: Good behavioural and automation fit (VC/sport/culture platform), but the posting is no longer accepting applications — closed.
fetch_note: LinkedIn job 4366390156 explicitly shows 'No longer accepting applications' (posted ~4 months ago). availability=closed, interview_likelihood=null. Had it been open this would have scored ~62 (Stretch) given the light coding 'ideally' bar.
